    descriptionGood job, congratulations on your new rank in the guild! Following the recent discovery of Kritillian, a new lawless hunting ground have open for us. This new system seems to be very rich in irridium, a very sought after resource. Go there and take out 50 targets and loot 'em dry of their precious irridium.
